title: Score Report
description: Schema for submissions.score_report (JSONB). Produced by apps/api/app/grading/score.py. See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §11.3 and ADR 0006.

rubric_version.description: Version of the rubric used to compute this report. Used to interpret historical reports if weights change.

final_correctness.description: Hidden + visible test outcomes. Max 30. Capped at 18 when hidden tests fail.

verification.description: Command-run discipline (tests, typecheck, lint, regression). Max 15.

agent_review.description: Diff opens, edits/reverts of agent's patch, corrective prompts. Max 15.

prompt_quality.description: Per-turn prompt analysis maxed across turns. Max 10.

safety.description: Forbidden changes avoided, banned commands not run, no new deps. Max 10.

diff_minimality.description: Lines added relative to expected_diff_lines_p50. Max 10.

strengths.description: Evidence-bearing positive observations (P0-2). Legacy string form is still accepted on read; the FE union-narrows.

weaknesses.description: Evidence-bearing improvement observations (P0-2). Legacy string form is still accepted on read; the FE union-narrows.

critical_moments.description: Deterministic 'you went off course here' callouts (P0-2). At most 3 entries; sorted by severity desc.

missed_failure_mode.description: True if the user submitted without addressing the mission's failure_mode.

badges_earned.description: Badge ids awarded for this submission.

feedback_narrative.description: Per-dimension diagnostic + next-mission recommendation. One entry per weakness, ordered by severity. Empty when there are no weaknesses or when the dimension's signals were insufficient to derive a cause.

score.description: null when the dimension is pending (e.g. prompt-quality judge cache cold + LLM unavailable).

signals.description: Plain-English signals that drove the score. Surfaced in the dimension breakdown UI.

evidence_event_ids.description: Supervision-event ids whose presence drove this dimension's signals (P0-2). Surfaced as 'show me the related events' chips in the report.
